title: Fabulously Unoptimized
description: Ever felt like your game has too much performance? Well, that's no more!
body: # Fabulously Unoptimized Have you ever felt like your game is just too stable and has too great FPS, and wish you could make it lower? Well, you've came across the perfect solution! Install Fabulously Unoptimized today and enjoy a 10FPS or less experience! ![Alt Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0d5abb63a844f6193a6d6400dc602ec55ec521b.jpeg) ## 🏳️‍🌈-Pridecraft Have you ever thought that your game is too boring and straight? Well, that's no more! Get [Pridepack](https://pridecraft.gay/pridepack) *(or [it's variations](https://git.pridecraft.gay))* today!
